---
title: "MetricObjective"
generated: true
description: "An image-pair [`Metric`](../nitrix-register/Metric.qmd) as an [`Objective`](../nitrix-register/Objective.qmd)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._objective`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MetricObjective -->
```python
class MetricObjective
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:MetricObjective -->
An image-pair [`Metric`](../nitrix-register/Metric.qmd) as an [`Objective`](../nitrix-register/Objective.qmd).

Pairs a metric with the level's warp closure (`params -> warped`)
and the `fixed` image, so `cost(params) = metric.cost(warp(params),
fixed)` -- the form the coarse-to-fine driver optimises.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MetricObjective.cost -->
```python
cost(params: Float[Array, ' p']) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Scalar cost of the warped moving image against `fixed`.

Warps the moving image with `warp(params)` and scores it against the
`fixed` image under `metric`, restricted by `mask` where given.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MetricObjective.residual -->
```python
residual(params: Float[Array, ' p']) -> Float[Array, ' m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Least-squares residual of the warped image against `fixed`.

Warps the moving image with `warp(params)` and returns the metric's
residual vector against the `fixed` image, restricted by `mask`
where given. Defined only when the metric is least-squares.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:MetricObjective.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(metric: Metric, warp: Callable[[Float[Array, ' p']], Float[Array, '*spatial']], fixed: Float[Array, '*spatial'], mask: Optional[Float[Array, '*spatial']] = None) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:MetricObjective -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
